lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excuse me...

lines.speaker: Moldof
lines.text: Can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me anything about the castle?

lines.speaker: Moldof
lines.text: There aren't many guards in it.

lines.speaker: Moldof
lines.text: We don't have an army, you see.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How's the weather doing?

lines.speaker: Moldof
lines.text: Could be better.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How's life in Etceteria?

lines.speaker: Moldof
lines.text: *sigh* Times are tough.

lines.speaker: Moldof
lines.text: Though they're getting better.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's it like being an Etceterian?

lines.speaker: Moldof
lines.text: Fairly pleasant, though it gets cold in the winter.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nice town you have here.

lines.speaker: Moldof
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excuse me...

lines.speaker: Matilda
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: Matilda
lines.text: Thank you for finding my hat for me. Did you find everyone's belongings?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I did! Thank you for the reward.

lines.speaker: Matilda
lines.text: You're more than welcome to it, for getting our belongings back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me how the kingdom approves of me?

lines.speaker: Matilda
lines.text: Kingdom? Etceteria is ruled by a Queen and we don't approve of you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me how the kingdom approves of me?

lines.speaker: Matilda
lines.text: [amount]% of people approve of you.

lines.speaker: Matilda
lines.text: The storerooms are full, your Highness. You should talk to Advisor Ghrim to collect what we've gathered for you.
